chunks.text: Property ID: RE-1029 Modern 3-bedroom apartment in a gated community near downtown. - Asking price: $485,000 - Availability: 2026-05-15 - Address: 214 Maple Grove Avenue, Austin, TX 78704 - HOA: $320/month - Annual taxes: $6,820 - Contact: listings@evergreenhomes.com - Phone: (512) 555-0147 Highlights: - Open-plan kitchen with quartz counters - Two secure parking spaces - Balcony facing the community garden - Close to schools, transit, and retail
